articles.author: Rebecca Rosman
articles.title: Italy's Meloni, once Trump's closest ally in Europe, says he made up a story about her - NPR
articles.description: "Italy and I do not beg," Meloni said in a video rebuke posted on social media Friday. Italy's top diplomat, meanwhile, said he was cancelling a visit to the U.S because of the alleged remarks.
articles.content: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni has accused President Trump of fabricating a story that she "begged" him for a photo at the G7 summit, in a stunning public break between the two leaders once co… [+3099 chars]
